# What's in This Release — [Version / Release Name]

<!--
  USAGE: Produced by the /release skill. Audience: product managers, BAs, stakeholders.
  No technical knowledge required to read this document.

  Language rules:
  - No technical terms without explanation
  - Written as "you can now..." / "we fixed..." / "we improved..."
  - Each change described as a user-visible behaviour, not a code change
  - If a change is invisible to users, say so and explain why it matters
  - Quote exact UI text if relevant

  To evolve: update this template, open a PR, tag product lead + BA lead.
-->

**Available from:** [YYYY-MM-DD]

## What's New

### [User-Friendly Title]

[2–3 sentences. What users can now do, or what problem is fixed.
Written as if explaining to a customer. No jargon.]

<!-- Repeat for each new capability in this release. -->

## What We Fixed

### [Plain-language description of the fix]

[What was broken, what's better now, who was affected.]
